story: 107.R1 follow-up: toke repair sample-50 (1 Opus attempt each)

programs.hint: Unterminated string literal at end of file. Every " needs a closing ". If the program looks truncated, regenerate from scratch.
programs.source: m=cli;f=trim(s:$str):$str{let len=s.len;let start=mut.0;lp(let i=0;i<len;i=i+1){let c=s.get(i);if(!(c=32 as u8))el{start=i+1};};let end=mut.len;lp(let i=len-1;!(i<0);i=i-1){let c=s.get(i);if(!(c=32 as u8))el{end=i-1};};let result=mut."";lp(let i=start;i<end+1;i=i+1){result=s.concat(result;s.get(i))as$str;};<result};f=padright(s:$str;width:i64):$str{let slen=s.len;if(!(slen<width))el{<s};let result=mut.s;lp(let i=slen;i<width;i=i+1){result=s.concat(result;" ");};<result};f=bold(s:$str):$str{<s.concat(s.concat("\033[1m";s);"\033[0m")};f=underline(s:$str):$str{<s.concat(s.concat("\033[4m";s);"\033[0)

programs.hint: Identifier contains underscore (v0.2 syntax). Concatenate words: my_var → myvar, to_int → toint, get_count → getcount.
Unexpected '}'. A block closed early — usually a missing ; before this } or an extra } from over-nesting.
programs.source: m=scale;f=scale(arr:@$f64):@$f64{let n=arr.len;if(n=0){<@};let minval=mut.0.0;let maxval=mut.0.0;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let v=arr.get(i);if(i=0){minval=v;maxval=v}el{if(v<minval){minval=v};if(v>maxval){maxval=v}}};let range=maxval-minval;let result=mut.@();lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let v=arr.get(i);let s=(v-minval)/range;result=result+@(s)});<result};f=main():$void{let arr=@(10.0;20.0;30.0;40.0;50.0;60.0;70.0;80.0));let scaled=scale(arr);let n=scaled.len;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let s=scaled.get(i);};};

programs.hint: Missing semicolon. Toke separates EVERY statement with ; (never newlines). Every let/assignment/call/return needs a trailing ;. Inside lp(){body}, body statements also need ; between them.
programs.source: m=setup;f=setup(alice:$str;bob:$str):$str{let alicekey=generatekey(alice);let bobkey=generatekey(bob);let aliceephemeral=generateephemeral();let bobephemeral=generateephemeral();let aliceshared=computekey(alicekey;bobephemeral);let bobshared=computekey(bobkey;aliceephemeral);let sessionkey=hashkey(aliceshared;bobshared));let nonce=generatenonce();let ciphertext=encrypt(sessionkey;nonce;alicekey;bobkey));let mac=hashkey(sessionkey;nonce));let result=buildmessage(ciphertext;mac;nonce;alicekey;bobkey));<result};f=generatekey(seed:$str):$str{let hash=hashfunction(seed);let key=extractkey(hash);<key};f=generateephemeral():$str{let ephemeral=generatekey("ephemeral");<ephemeral};f=computekey(shared:$str;ephemeral:$str):$str{let combined=hashfunction(s.concat(shared;ephemeral));let key=extractkey(combined);<key};f=hashfunction(data

programs.hint: Missing semicolon. Toke separates EVERY statement with ; (never newlines). Every let/assignment/call/return needs a trailing ;. Inside lp(){body}, body statements also need ; between them.

m=gitlog;f=parseauthorline(line:$str):$str{let idx=line.find(" <");if(idx<0){<""};let author=line.slice(0;idx);<author};f=countcontributions(author:$str;lines:@$str):i64{let count=mut.0;lp(let i=0;i<lines.len;i=i+1){let line=lines.get(i);let found=line.find(author);if(found<0){}el{count=count+1};};<count};f=processlog(lines:@$str):i64{let total=mut.0;let count=lines.len;lp(let i=0;i<count;i=i+1){let line=lines.get(i);let author=parseauthorline(line);if(author.len=0){}el{let c=countcontributions(author;line));total=total+c;};};<total};f=main():$i64{let input="Author: Alice <alice@example.com>

programs.hint: Code is incomplete — truncated or an unclosed (/[/{/". Count opening vs closing delimiters; if the program looks heavily truncated, rewrite the complete program from scratch rather than trying to patch the end.

Unexpected token in expression. Common causes: (a) keyword used as identifier (i, f, t, m, as, el, lp, br, let, mut, rt, mt) — rename; (b) missing operator between values; (c) comma instead of semicolon (toke uses ; everywhere).

Missing semicolon. Toke separates EVERY statement with ; (never newlines). Every let/assignment/call/return needs a trailing ;. Inside lp(){body}, body statements also need ; between them. | Extra closing paren ')'. Count parens — every '(' needs exactly one ')'. Common cause: doubled if((cond)) or trailing paren on a call.

E9020: no main function defined. Every EXECUTABLE toke program needs an entry point. Add `f=main():$i64{<0;}` (or one that reads stdin via io.readln(), calls your helper functions, and prints results via io.println). Library-only modules compile under --check but cannot be built into a runnable binary.
programs.source: m=avg;f=solve(p0:$str):$str{let data=mut.@();let lines=p0.split("\n");let headers=lines.get(0);let idxname=headers.indexof("name");let idxage=headers.indexof("age");lp(let i=1;i<lines.len;i=i+1){let line=lines.get(i);let cols=line.split(",");let name=cols.get(idxname);let age=cols.get(idxage);data=data+@(name);};let total=mut.0;lp(let i=0;i<data.len;i=i+1){let name=data.get(i);if(name="alice"){total=total+1};};<total as$str};

programs.hint: Unexpected '}'. A block closed early — usually a missing ; before this } or an extra } from over-nesting. | Code is incomplete — truncated or an unclosed (/[/{/". Count opening vs closing delimiters; if the program looks heavily truncated, rewrite the complete program from scratch rather than trying to patch the end.
programs.source: m=meminfo;f=parseint(s:$str):$i64{let n=s.len;let m=mut.0;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let c=s.get(i);let d=c as i64-48 as i64;m=m*10+d;};<m};f=trimprefix(s:$str;prefix:$str):$str{let n=s.len;let m=prefix.len;if(n<m){<""};let z=mut.true;lp(let i=0;i<m;i=i+1){let c=s.get(i);let d=prefix.get(i);if(!(c=d)){z=false}};if(!(z)){<""};<s.substr(m;n-m)>};f=trimprefix2
